title: Mailchimp vs Beehiiv (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and Beehiiv: pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your needs best.
h1: Mailchimp vs Beehiiv: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: Mailchimp and Beehiiv are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Mailchimp is an established all-in-one marketing platform ideal for small businesses and e-commerce, while Beehiiv is a modern newsletter platform built for content creators and publishers. Understanding their differences will help you choose the right tool for your specific goals.

comparison_table.tool_a: Drag-drop editor, landing pages, A/B testing
comparison_table.tool_b: Newsletter monetization, ad network, referral program

choose_a_if: You're a beginner or small business owner needing an affordable all-in-one platform with landing pages and e-commerce integrations
You want to start free with up to 500 subscribers and prefer lower paid tier pricing ($13/month)
You need comprehensive marketing automation, A/B testing, and audience segmentation for campaigns
choose_b_if: You're a newsletter publisher or media operator looking to monetize your audience through ads and referrals
You need a generous free tier supporting up to 2,500 subscribers before upgrading
You want a modern platform specifically designed for content creators with built-in growth and monetization features

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Mailchimp is better for small businesses and e-commerce with its broader feature set and lower pricing, while Beehiiv excels for newsletter publishers wanting to monetize their audience. Beehiiv has higher customer satisfaction ratings (4.7 vs 4.3 on G2), but Mailchimp offers more traditional marketing automation features.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Beehiiv?
faq.a: Mailchimp is cheaper overall, starting at $13/month for paid plans compared to Beehiiv's $39/month. However, Beehiiv offers a more generous free tier with 2,500 subscribers versus Mailchimp's 500, making Beehiiv better value if you stay on the free plan longer.

faq.q: Can I switch from Beehiiv to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists, though the process and data fields transferred may vary. Most email platforms support CSV exports, but you should verify that all custom fields and segments transfer correctly before switching.
